examples: You have devoured all when you were standing godmother.
"All good things go in threes," said she, "I am asked to stand godmother again."
All this, however, was untrue; the cat had no cousin, and had not been asked to be godmother.
Another minister was godmother to a child of Telmex's top legal official, Javier Mondragon.
But as in all good stories, a fairy godmother has arrived in the nick of time.
